description: An alpine ecologist needs to map vigorous vegetation surviving at high elevations. Using 'landsat_multispectral.tif' (SWIR1=band_1, NIR=band_2, Red=band_3, Green=band_4) and 'srtm_dem.tif' (Elevation=band_1) from ~/snap_data/, produce a collocated product with the Landsat image as the master. In this product, create an 'ndvi' band using the formula (NIR - Red) / (NIR + Red) and a binary mask band named 'alpine_veg_mask' where ndvi > 0.2 and elevation > 150. Save the enriched product to ~/snap_projects/alpine_study.dim and export the 'alpine_veg_mask' band as a GeoTIFF to ~/snap_exports/alpine_mask.tif.
